title: Vegan Pilaf with Crisp Delicate Vegetables
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegan pilaf dish loaded with crisp delicate vegetables. A perfect option for a quick and easy meal.

ingredients.name: delicate vegetables (such as carrots and zucchini)
crisp vegetables (such as bell peppers and onions)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the crisp vegetables and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the delicate vegetables and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the pilaf and beef broth to the pan, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 20 minutes, or until the pilaf is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Stir in the chopped Russian dill.
